answer:
We need the probability that at least one of the events occurs.  
Event A (heart) has 13 cards, Event B (not a face card) has 40 cards, Event C (spots divisible by 3: 3,6,9) has 12 cards.  
Using inclusion-exclusion and counting carefully, the union size is 43, so probability = 43/52.  

\boxed{F}
